title: (Sacramento, CA)
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: AB 1767 will expand school district suicide prevention policies to be age appropriate for kindergarten and grades 1 to 6.
The policy will be developed by school and community stakeholders, school-employed mental health professionals, and suicide prevention experts.
The 40th Assembly District has experienced occurrences of suicide among its young residents.
At the beginning of the 2018 school year, 4 students died by suicide in the first two weeks of the school.
